effects: Limit Break Bonus Passive Reference:

* Limit Break Damage Up: Multiplies the limit break damage factor by:
1.00/1.00/1.50/1.50/2.00 when 250 LB gauge spent
2.50/2.50/3.00/3.00/3.50 when 500 LB gauge spent
8.00/8.00/14.00/14.00/20.00 when 750 LB gauge spent
At limit break honing level 1/2/3/4/5
* Cast Time Down: Cast speed x1.03/1.50/2.00/2.50/3.00 at limit break honing level 1/2/3/4/5
* Dark Damage Up: Grants [Buff Dark 10% (15s)] to all allies
* Earth Damage Up: Grants [Buff Earth 10% (15s)] to all allies
* Fire Damage Up: Grants [Buff Fire 10% (15s)] to all allies
* Holy Damage Up: Grants [Buff Holy 10% (15s)] to all allies
* Ice Damage Up: Grants [Buff Ice 10% (15s)] to all allies
* Lightning Damage Up: Grants [Buff Lightning 10% (15s)] to all allies
* Water Damage Up: Grants [Buff Water 10% (15s)] to all allies
* Wind Damage Up: Grants [Buff Wind 10% (15s)] to all allies
